stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
With reference to the attached annex for an aircraft in a steady climb, which of the following statements is correct...

options.a: (1) is equal to Lift; (5) is equal to Lift + Weight * cos(γ)
options.b: (5) is equal to Lift; (8) is equal to Drag + Weight * sin(γ)
options.c: (8) is equal to Thrust; (3) is equal to Drag
options.d: (4) is equal to Thrust; (7) is equal to Weight
